overrides.expect: \left[ \begin{array}{c c} M _ {x x} & M _ {x y} \\ \hline M _ {y x} & M _ {y y} \end{array} \right] = \left[ \begin{array}{c} \text {overall 4\times 4} \\ \text {matrix product} \end{array} \right].
overrides.new: \left[ \begin{array}{c c} M _ {x x} & M _ {x y} \\ \hline M _ {y x} & M _ {y y} \end{array} \right] = \left[ \begin{array}{c} \text {overall } 4\times 4 \\ \text {matrix product} \end{array} \right].

overrides.expect: \left[ \begin{array}{c} \text {ray path from P_{1} to P_{2}} \\ \text {through X_{1} and X_{2}} \end{array} \right] \quad \equiv \quad \left[ \begin{array}{c} \text {ray path from P_{1} to P_{2}} \\ \text {along the optical axis} \end{array} \right],
overrides.new: \left[ \begin{array}{c} \text {ray path from } P_{1} \text { to } P_{2} \\ \text {through } X_{1} \text { and } X_{2} \end{array} \right] \quad \equiv \quad \left[ \begin{array}{c} \text {ray path from } P_{1} \text { to } P_{2} \\ \text {along the optical axis} \end{array} \right],

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} r _ {a, 2} & = A r _ {a, 1} + B r _ {a, 1} ^ {\prime} = (A + B / R _ {a}) r _ {a, 1} \\ & = r _ {a, 1} / \lambda_ {a} = r _ {a, 1} / M \qquad \text {(demagnifying eigenwave R_{a}).} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r l} r _ {a, 2} & = A r _ {a, 1} + B r _ {a, 1} ^ {\prime} = (A + B / R _ {a}) r _ {a, 1} \\ & = r _ {a, 1} / \lambda_ {a} = r _ {a, 1} / M \qquad \text {(demagnifying eigenwave } R_{a}\text {).} \end{array}
